name: Amish Friendship Bread
recipeInstructions:
Day 1: Find out what day it is.
Day 2: Stir with a wooden spoon.
Day 3: Stir with a wooden spoon.
Day 4: Stir with a wooden spoon.
Day 5: Add 1 cup each sugar, milk, plain flour. Stir well with a wooden spoon.
Day 6: Stir with a wooden spoon.
Day 7: Stir with a wooden spoon.
Day 8: Stir with a wooden spoon.
Day 9: Stir with a wooden spoon.
Day 10: Add 1 cup each sugar, milk, plain flour. Pour the mixture into 3 plastic or glass containers. Give 2 to friends; keep one for starter.
Optional: Add 1 cup chopped nuts, raisins, blueberries, chopped apples, etc.
Pour into 2 well greased loaf pans or 1 Bundt pan (a tube pan worked well). Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-50 minutes, until a toothpick comes out clean. Let cool in the pan for 10 minutes, then remove.
WARNING: Do not use metal. Do not refrigerate.
